AND gate: place, wire, simulate, verify truth table
OR gate: place, wire, simulate, verify truth table
NOT gate: inverter
NAND gate: verify truth table
XOR gate: verify truth table
half adder: XOr for sum, And for carry (fan-out)
full adder: sum and carry for all 8 input combos
SR latch from NAND gates: set, hold, reset
D flip-flop: clock-edge triggered latch
JK flip-flop: hold, set, reset, toggle
T flip-flop 4-bit ripple counter
4-bit counter: count sequence via built-in Counter
2:1 Mux: selector routes correct input to output
4:1 Mux: 2-bit selector routes one of four inputs
Decoder: 2-bit input produces one-hot outputs
4-bit adder: multi-bit arithmetic with carry
Comparator: less, equal, greater for 4-bit values
ROM lookup: read preloaded data by address
RAM write/read: store and retrieve values
Register file: write and read registers
Tunnel wiring: signal propagates through named tunnels
Bus splitter: 8-bit to 4+4 nibbles
Priority encoder: highest active input index
